title: Antique Optimizations
description: A modpack to improve performance and bug fixes for forge 1.7.10
body:
# Warning!
### This modpack is only changed minimal configs. Please deal with incompatibles yourself.
### ↓How to use modern java (in Japanese)↓   
[https://madoha-4862.hatenablog.jp/entry/2025/01/28/220720](https://madoha-4862.hatenablog.jp/entry/2025/01/28/220720)
## Angelica Edition
You can use Embeddium and Iris in Angelica. It's good for most of people who know nothing.  
Colored Lights introduction  
https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/supernova  
DistantHorizonsStandalone and Bobbert are also available.  
https://github.com/DarkShadow44/DistantHorizonsStandalone  
https://github.com/wahfl2/Bobbert  
### Modlist
- Angelica
- ArchaicFix
- BugTorch
- ChunkAPI
- CoreTweaks
- EndlessIDs
- Euphoria Patcher
- FalsePatternLib
- GTNH Lib
- Hodgepodge
- Supernova
- UniMixins
- lwjgl3ify
## Beddium Edition
Sometimes this edition has more compatibility.  
You can also use Colored Lights (RPLE) or Fastcraft.
### Modlist
- ArchaicFix
- Beddium
- BugTorch
- ChunkAPI
- CoreTweaks
- EndlessIDs
- FalsePatternLib
- FalseTweaks
- GTNH Lib
- Hodgepodge
- Lumi
- NotFine
- Right Proper MCPatcher
- SwanSong
- UniMixins
- lwjgl3ify
## Incompatibles

OptiFine : Use Angelica or SwanSong.

## Credit (Overrides)
